scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key aspects: juju.run() signature, Task attributes (results, success, status, stdout, stderr, return_code, log, message, id), and error handling. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is not mentioned in the gold standard — gold standard says juju.run() raises TaskError automatically on failure, not via a method call on Task. This appears to be a hallucinated method.
